watchlist.notes: S&P 500 ETF — PRIMARY market posture indicator. Pre-market routine classifies posture via SPY SMA relationships (see strategy.md Market Posture System): GREEN (above SMA 20 AND SMA 20 > SMA 50) / CAUTION (below SMA 20 but above SMA 50) / RED (below SMA 50) / BEAR (below SMA 200). Old price-level trip-wire ($736) retired 2026-05-19 — it was stale. Also tradeable as day-trade vehicle on high-volume trend days.

Nasdaq 100 ETF — tech/growth sector posture proxy. Monitor QQQ SMA relationships alongside SPY: if QQQ is CAUTION while SPY is GREEN, tech-heavy setups face additional headwind. Also tradeable as day-trade vehicle. Old price-level trip-wire ($700) retired 2026-05-19.
SPDR Tech Sector ETF. Tech sector trend proxy AND tradeable swing setup. Strong trending instrument.
SPDR Healthcare Sector ETF. Defensive sector proxy AND tradeable. Good long in risk-off rotation.
SPDR Energy Sector ETF. Energy sector proxy AND tradeable swing setup. Excellent short candidate in risk-off environments.
SPDR Industrials Sector ETF. Cyclical sector proxy.
SPDR Financials Sector ETF. Rate-sensitive — short candidate when yield curve flattens.

update_reason: Converted to posture-proxies-only (7 ETFs). Individual stocks were a bottleneck — market-scan covers 650 symbols and is the real discovery engine. Internet-flagged symbols from Step 0b now prime the debate queue instead of a static list. Individual stocks previously tracked here (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, TSLA, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AMD, LLY, JPM, GS, CRM, PANW, XOM, PLTR, AVGO, TSM, ARM, CEG, VST, NNE, SMR) are discovered dynamically. Use /track in Discord to pin specific symbols for short-term follow-up (memory/tracking.json, 5-day expiry).
